race.description: Inland Petroleum Winter Country Classic Qualifier Cg&E Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: Tricky race. IKNOWYOU (6) jumps out to the 1300m for the first time after he went under narrowly with the 58kg to run second over 1000m at Quirindi. Maps well and no excuses with the senior rider aboard. AILYAK (3) back after a long spell and now in the Michael Mulholland stable. Returns with the one trial and has a host of gear changes. Look for him closing strongly. DIVINE CONCLUSION (12) had mixed luck in his two runs back and desperate for this trip and further now. Up in grade and failed to sprint with them when fifth over 1200m at Bathurst. Fitter now and deserves another chance. GREEN PINEAPPLE (17) drifted back again from the good gate and savaged the line with a narrow third over 1400m at Bathurst. Key jockey change and comes here in peak condition.
